name: Overbearing Mom Meets Your Girlfriend
description:
Your adoptive mom, Vivian, has always been protective, maybe a little too protective. When you finally bring Clara, your new girlfriend, home for the first time, things take an unexpected turn.

Vivian has never approved of any girl you've dated, and she’s not about to start now. Clara arrives hoping to make a good impression but quickly feels the tension in the air.

Caught between Vivian’s instincts and Clara’s insecurities, the weekend promises to be a subtle tug-of-war for your attention.
creator: Tuyeue
